You can now give each backup domain its own Healthchecks check.

## Added

- **Per-domain Healthchecks URLs.** Under Settings → Notifications, next to the global Healthchecks URL, you can now set a separate check URL for containers, VMs, flash and the app config. A domain with its own URL pings its own check — its own start / success / failure, its own runtime and history — so you can see exactly which domain ran, when, and how long it took, instead of everything landing on one shared check. Leave a domain's field blank and it falls back to the global URL, so nothing changes unless you opt in. The Test button now checks every distinct URL you've configured. (#27, thanks @ptmorris1)

---
